name: Ablation: MRL Dimensionality
description: Systematic evaluation of all MRL sub-dims for the fine-tuned nomic-embed-v1.5 model (pipe format). Tests all 5 dims: [768, 512, 256, 128, 64] in fp32 and binary quantization. Answers: where is the quality-vs-memory knee in the curve?
notes: Run after exp 003. Iterates through dims x quantizations. Total 10 sub-experiments (5 dims × 2 quantizations). Results feed directly into production architecture decision. Look for the elbow: highest quality/memory ratio.
